body.after: for the Ummah. Your voluntary support helps us maintain servers, add new features, and serve Muslims worldwide.

quote.text: "Whoever guides someone to goodness will have a reward like one who did it."

bottom.optionalBody: The app will always remain free for the Ummah. No features are locked behind donations. Your support simply helps us grow and serve more Muslims worldwide.
bottom.footerNote: All contributions are voluntary and help maintain our servers, develop new features, and expand our reach to Muslims across the globe.
